hero.title:
Capture Life.
Hands-Free.
hero.subtitle: Discover the next generation of intelligent face-tracking. Smooth, portable, and ready for your next adventure.

advantages.title: Six Product Advantages
advantages.description: Engineered for creators who demand perfection in every frame.

items.title: AI Face Tracking
items.desc: Intelligent lens instantly locks onto you, keeping you perfectly in frame.

items.title: Aerospace Alloy
items.desc: Lightweight, durable aluminum construction designed for the long haul.

items.title: Bluetooth Remote
items.desc: Control your shots from a distance with ultra-low latency Bluetooth 5.2.

items.title: Steady Grip
items.desc: Anti-shake black technology ensures cinematic smoothness.

items.title: 360° Panoramic
items.desc: Unlimited rotation to capture every angle flawlessly.

items.title: Standard Mount
items.desc: 1/4" interface compatible with cameras, ring lights, and more.

tech.title: Breakthrough Black Technology
tech.quote: The future of solo content creation is here.

aiCloud.title: Next-Gen AI Tracking Chip
aiCloud.description: Equipped with a dedicated AI sensor array that requires zero app installation. Just turn it on, and it follows you seamlessly with 360° tracking capability. Perfect for vlogs, live streaming, and high-motion action.

useCases.vlogging: Ideal for vlogging and content creation on the go.

featured.title: Our Collection
featured.description: Find the perfect intelligent companion for your creative workflow.

newsletter.title: Join the Revolution
newsletter.description: Subscribe for early access to new releases and creator tips.

items.title: Silicone Grip
items.desc: Ergonomic, non-slip silicone ensures a comfortable and secure hold.

items.title: Secure Head Lock
items.desc: Heavy-duty locking mechanism keeps your device perfectly stable.

items.title: Standard Thread
items.desc: 1/4" universal thread mount for maximum compatibility.

lifestyle.title: Made for every moment
lifestyle.description: From solo travel vlogs to group adventures, never miss a shot with intelligent tracking that follows your every move.

hero3d.modelAltText: Interactive 3D view of a selfie stick and tripod

q04.title: Packed With Technology
q04.subtitle: Every feature engineered for the modern content creator.

features.bluetoothDesc: Control your shots from a distance with the included Bluetooth remote.
features.rotationDesc: Seamless full-circle AI face tracking keeps you in frame at all times.
features.chargingDesc: 7 hours of battery life with modern Type-C fast charging support.
features.noAppDesc: Works straight out of the box — zero downloads, zero setup needed.

remoteGuide.title: Master Your Remote
remoteGuide.subtitle: Every button on your Bluetooth remote has a purpose. Here is what each one does.

gestureGuide.title: AI Gesture Control
gestureGuide.subtitle: Your hands are the controller. Use simple gestures to start tracking, take photos, or pause.
gestureGuide.okDesc: Show the OK hand sign to the camera and the tracker will begin following you within 1 second.
gestureGuide.palmDesc: Hold your open palm up to the camera. Within 3 seconds, tracking will pause and the device will hold its position.
